questions.question: Explain how the 'Anticipation' principle applies to loading animations.
expectedPoints: Signals that content is preparing to load
Manages user expectations during wait times
Provides visual feedback that the system is working

questions.question: Discuss the importance of performance optimization in UI animations and describe three best practices.
expectedPoints: Using transform and opacity properties for better performance
Reducing animation complexity on low-powered devices
Testing animations across different devices and browsers
